name: Exfiltrate RDS Snapshot by Sharing
description: Simulates an attacker sharing an RDS DB snapshot with an external AWS account, granting the attacker the ability to restore the database and access all its data.
prerequisites: An RDS DB instance and a manual snapshot (created by Pulumi infra). Note: RDS provisioning takes 5-10 minutes.
detection_signal: CloudTrail rds:ModifyDBSnapshotAttribute event adding restore permission for an external account ID
